description: Style NoteThis top from jealous 21 gives your wardrobe an immediate boost. The bright and trendy top flatters your figure and can be worn with a pair of shorts or jeans and heels.Product DetailsBlack striped top, has a shawl neck, cap sleeves with glitter on it and has the front hem longer than the backMaterial and Care100% viscoseHand wash or machine wash using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Use warm iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
